files.patch:
@@ -391,0 +391,6 @@
+  product(bool, InlineColdMethods, false, DIAGNOSTIC,                       \
+          "Inline cold methods that would otherwise be rejected due to "    \
+          "cold profile counters. Useful for compiler testing to expose "   \
+          "more code to compilers.")                                        \
+                                                                            \
+

@@ -698,0 +698,1 @@
+  bool            _is_late_inlined_call; // True if this call was late inlined
@@ -705,1 +706,2 @@
-      _name(nullptr)
+      _name(nullptr),
+      _is_late_inlined_call(false)
@@ -714,0 +716,1 @@
+  bool is_late_inlined_call()  const { return _is_late_inlined_call; }
@@ -719,0 +722,1 @@
+  void set_late_inlined_call(bool v)    { _is_late_inlined_call = v; }

@@ -310,0 +310,5 @@
+                // Artificially expand the scope of inlining in the absence of reasonable profile:
+                // inline cold methods and bump the static inlining limits.
+                "-XX:+InlineColdMethods",
+                "-XX:MaxInlineSize=50",
+                "-XX:C1MaxInlineSize=50",
